text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Several days after the Tracen Meet, I stop by the training course, only
to notice the students crowded around a certain area.

text_block_list.name: Umamusume A
text_block_list.text: Huff... huff... I finished!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
It seems the students are competing with each other in mock races. As
I look past the winning racer, I see a familiar face.

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text: Cough... wheeze... I... finished... too!

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text: Huff... Puff... L-looks like I lost...

text_block_list.name: Umamusume A
text_block_list.text: That was a lot of fun though! Thanks, Urara!

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text:
I'm the one who should be thanking you! But watch out! I won't lose
next time!

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text: All righty... Who should I race nex—Hm? Ah, it's you again!

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text: No way, this is totally different! I'm dojo storming!

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text:
I read aaall about it in a comic book! You go up to strong people,
challenge them, and win!

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text:
The comic said that was the secret to getting stronger, so I thought
I'd try it out!
choice_data_list: But it looks like you lost...

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text: Yeah, but I just know I'll win the next one!

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text: The dojo storming continues! My next opponent will be...

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text: Ah! Spe! Hey, Special Week!

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: Oh, hello, Urara! Are you training too?

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text:
Yup, and I came up with a new way to do it too! Spe... I challenge
you!

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: Huh? Challenge?

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text: Yeah! Now you've gotta race me! Come on, Spe! Let's go!

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: What? Right now?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: With that, Haru Urara has found her next dojo to storm. However...

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: Huff... Huff... Across the line!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
A while after Special Week finishes, an exhausted Haru Urara
approaches the finish line.

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text: Wheeze... Finished...

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text: N-no more...

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: Oh no, Urara!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
It's clear that Haru Urara's tenacity outmatches her stamina. While she
may have crossed the finish line, she collapses almost immediately
after.

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text: Phew, I thought I was gonna pass out!

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: You did pass out...

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text: Well, no worries either way! I'm all rested and ready for anything!

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text: Still, you really are amazing, Spe! A worthy rival, for sure!

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: Th-thank you?

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text: Don't get too cocky though! I won't lose next time!

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text: After seeing you run like the wind, I just know I can do the same!

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: All right then, let's race again sometime!

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text: Ehehe, I'm gonna hold you to that!

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text: Okay... Back to dojo storming! My next challenge awaits! Bring it on!

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: Ah... There she goes...

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: That energy of hers really is something else. She's always so cheerful.

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
I know, right?! I always feel so bad after losing, but Urara is ready to
accept the next challenge no matter what...

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: Her fearless attitude gives me motivation to try harder.

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: And talking about motivation, I better get back to work too!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Whether it's the Tracen Meet or dojo storming, Haru Urara continues
on with a smile, even in defeat.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: And it's become clear to me that her optimism is contagious.
